data.body:
## Adversarial Review Finding
[Scope Overlap] The explore agent is dispatched by the orchestrator (user or /dso:sprint), not by the brainstorm-preplanning-implementation-plan pipeline. Story 2's structured output improvements have standalone value for any exploration dispatch — they prevent the class of error where the orchestrator receives an incomplete report. The consumer is the orchestrator, not the pipeline skills. No integration point with Story 4 (impl-plan) is needed — impl-plan performs its own independent file scan.
